headline: Will Domino’s (DPZ) Shinola Tie-In Meaningfully Elevate Its Premium Brand and Digital Strategy?
summary: Domino's Pizza Inc. recently launched its new Slice Sauce and, through June 14, 2026, is giving it away free with any online Handmade Pan or Parmesan Stuffed Crust Pizza purchase, while also granting customers password-only access to shop an exclusive collection of Domino's-branded Shinola watches and leather goods at preferred rates. This cross-promotion blends menu innovation with a premium lifestyle brand partnership, signaling Domino's push to deepen digital engagement and enhance the...
